title: dactylorhiza × aschersoniana nothosubsp. predaensis
intro: Dactylorhiza × aschersoniana nothosubsp. predaensis is a nothosubspecies of orchid, which is a hybrid species resulting from the cross-breeding of two different species of orchids. This plant is also known as the Predeal Spiranthes or Predeal Orchid, and it is native to Romania. Dactylorhiza × aschersoniana nothosubsp. predaensis has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly as a source of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various conditions such as cardiovascular diseases, diabetes, and respiratory issues, and herbal preparations of Dactylorhiza × aschersoniana nothosubsp. predaensis may be used in the form of extracts, tinctures, or infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
